notes: 0U ZeroU vertical rack PDU — not rack-unit consuming, so rackUnits omitted. Input connector is NEMA L21-20P (3-phase twist-lock), which is not in the allowed connector list; mapped to nema-5-15 as closest available. NEMA 5-20R outlets mapped to nema-5-15 (closest in schema). Serial and sensor ports are physically RJ12 (6P6C) connectors, mapped to rj45 as closest available. Management port sharing In/Out connector type inferred as RJ45 from AP88XX user manual documentation. C13 outlets mapped to iec (C13 receptacle). Primary source (apc.com) returned 403; specs confirmed from multiple secondary retailer pages and AP88XX user manual references. Confidence is medium due to reliance on secondary sources for management port details.

ports.name: Power In
ports.note: NEMA L21-20P twist-lock 3-phase plug, 208V 20A, 6ft captive cord. nema-5-15 is not correct — closest available connector in schema; actual is NEMA L21-20P (3-phase locking), which is not in the allowed connector list.

ports.name: C19 Outlet 1–6
ports.note: 6× IEC 60320 C19 locking receptacles, higher-amperage output

ports.name: NEMA 5-20R 1–2
ports.note: 2× NEMA 5-20R non-locking outlets, 120V output. nema-5-15 is closest available in schema; actual connector is NEMA 5-20R.

ports.name: Network Port
ports.note: 10/100Base-T Ethernet for web, SNMP, CLI management via embedded NMC2

ports.name: Serial Port
ports.note: RJ12 (6P6C) serial configuration port, uses APC cable 940-0144A (RJ12 to DB9). Closest schema connector is rj45; actual is RJ12.

ports.name: Sensor Port
ports.note: RJ12 socket for optional environmental sensors (AP9335T temp, AP9335TH temp/humidity). Closest schema connector is rj45; actual is RJ12.

ports.name: Network Port Sharing In
ports.note: RJ45 daisy-chain in port for network port sharing (up to 4 PDUs per IP)

ports.name: Network Port Sharing Out
ports.note: RJ45 daisy-chain out port for network port sharing
